← Ontology

Cultural_Hub_or_Learning_Center

Parent item
33314415-10e1-81eb-a955-dbd2808c3281
long_description
Regional centers that convene diverse actors become the connective tissue of a bioregion—where education, strategy, and relationship cross sectors and worldviews. They are places where sensemaking and alignment happen often enough that local projects can see themselves inside a larger story.
slug
Cultural_Hub_or_Learning_Center
Activities
33314415-10e1-812c-9c1a-d24d68085133, 33314415-10e1-81ee-8f91-e2f3f5f1155f, 33314415-10e1-8164-aaf3-c3e5ec59afd4, 33314415-10e1-8191-a1f1-fcdb4e5af9ba, 33314415-10e1-8123-86a5-d96670472c70, 33314415-10e1-817d-bb61-c182a27a3f84, 33314415-10e1-81ff-ab0d-e8640b246f10, 33314415-10e1-81ee-91cb-e99406fb70e5, 33314415-10e1-81f3-b0e6-fcc0d77bccf3, 33314415-10e1-81fb-b679-f806f1e7105b, 33314415-10e1-8182-a51d-fe1549931584, 33314415-10e1-8195-b0d2-e71cbbc7f08c, 33314415-10e1-81a1-aeb8-e12c4104edac
Description
Regional centers that convene diverse stakeholders to support education, capacity building, and collaborative strategy. These hubs serve as connective tissue across communities and ecosystems, hosting sensemaking processes that align local projects with larger bioregional goals.
parent_pattern_name
Hubs & Centers
sort_order
1
